sections.heading: Definition
sections.body:
The `$createUUID` expression takes no arguments and returns
a UUID BSON (Binary Javascript Object Notation) type (i.e. a BinData with subtype=4). The UUID
is a version 4 UUID conforming to [RFC 4122](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc4122).

sections.heading: Syntax
sections.body: The `$createUUID` expression is an empty object `{}` and has no internal syntax.

sections.heading: Behavior
sections.body: Pass `$createUUID: {}` in your aggregation pipeline to generate a UUID value.

sections.heading: Examples
